title: TechnicalChallenge
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 19b.4 (added by canon 0.4.0, ADR-018). Owned by governance-service (epd2_governance_service.domain.TechnicalChallenge). submitter_authorization_reference is a real, stored, opaque value here (mirroring PublicLedgerEntry.published_by_role_id's precedent) - the 'never published verbatim' rule is enforced one layer up, in events.py's *_public_payload, which omits this field entirely from every event. submitted_at must strictly precede the referenced ResultPublication.challenge_deadline_at. governance_decision_id must be set once status is upheld or rejected (adjudication is always a side effect of approving/rejecting the linked GovernanceDecision, never a standalone command). Terminal states (upheld/rejected) have no further transitions.
